content.content:
=== Is /Applications/coh a symlink or real dir? ===
/Users/steven/Library/Application Support/LaunchCat/coh
inode of /Applications/coh:                 205001060  dev=16777225
inode of ~/Library/.../LaunchCat/coh:        205001061  dev=16777225

=== size on disk of each (real duplicate check) ===
/Applications/coh:
  0B	/Applications/coh
~/Library/.../LaunchCat/coh:
5.6G	/Users/steven/Library/Application Support/LaunchCat/coh

=== does /Applications/coh contain the big assets too? ===
4.8G	/Applications/coh/assets
797M	/Applications/coh/wine

=== CoHModdingTool.app: what does the applet run? ===
drwxr-xr-x    - steven  5 Apr  2024 description.rtfd
drwxr-xr-x    - steven 28 Feb 13:30 Scripts
drwxr-xr-x    - steven 20 Oct  2022 Wine.app
drwxr-xr-x    - steven 22 Feb 19:52 wineprefix
drwxr-xr-x    - steven  9 Oct  2022 x64
drwxr-xr-x    - steven  9 Oct  2022 x86
.rw-r--r--  72k steven  5 Apr  2024 applet.icns
.rw-r--r--  362 steven  5 Apr  2024 applet.rsrc
.rwxr-xr-x 3.3M steven 28 Feb 12:39 CoHModdingTool.exe
.rw-r--r--  33k steven  5 Apr  2024 modder.db
.rw-r--r-- 1.1M steven 28 Feb 13:10 MyApp.icns
--- Scripts dir ---
.rw-r--r-- 15k steven 28 Feb 13:30 main.scpt
--- decompile main.scpt (applet source) ---
on run
	set appPath to POSIX path of (path to me)
	set resourcesPath to appPath & "Contents/Resources/"
	set wineBin to resourcesPath & "Wine.app/Contents/Resources/wine/bin/wine64"
	
	set supportBase to POSIX path of (path to library folder from user domain) & "Application Support/CityModInstaller/"
	set logPath to supportBase & "launcher.log"
	
	set userExe to supportBase & "CoHModdingTool.exe"
	set userPrefix to supportBase & "wineprefix"
	set userX86 to supportBase & "x86"
	set userX64 to supportBase & "x64"
	set userDb to supportBase & "modder.db"
	
	set bundleExe to resourcesPath & "CoHModdingTool.exe"
	set bundlePrefix to resourcesPath & "wineprefix"
	set bundleX86 to resourcesPath & "x86"
	set bundleX64 to resourcesPath & "x64"
	set bundleDb to resourcesPath & "modder.db"
	
	-- ensure base folder exists
	do shell script "/bin/mkdir -p " & quoted form of supportBase
	
	-- seed files if missing (IMPORTANT: spaces between args)
	do shell script "/bin/sh -lc " & quoted form of ("
echo \"=== seed $(date) ===\" >> " & quoted form of logPath & ";
echo \"supportBase=" & supportBase & "\" >> " & quoted form of logPath & ";
echo \"userExe=" & userExe & "\" >> " & quoted form of logPath & ";
echo \"bundleExe=" & bundleExe & "\" >> " & quoted form of logPath & ";

if [ ! -f " & quoted form of userExe & " ]; then
  echo \"Seeding EXE\" >> " & quoted form of logPath & ";
  /bin/cp " & quoted form of bundleExe & " " & quoted form of userExe & " >> " & quoted form of logPath & " 2>&1;
else
  echo \"EXE exists, not seeding\" >> " & quoted form of logPath & ";
fi;

if [ ! -d " & quoted form of userPrefix & " ]; then
  echo \"Seeding wineprefix\" >> " & quoted form of logPath & ";
  /bin/cp -R " & quoted form of bundlePrefix & " " & quoted form of userPrefix & " >> " & quoted form of logPath & " 2>&1;
else
  echo \"Prefix exists, not seeding\" >> " & quoted form of logPath & ";
fi;

if [ ! -d " & quoted form of userX86 & " ]; then
  echo \"Seeding x86 dir\" >> " & quoted form of logPath & ";
  /bin/cp -R " & quoted form of bundleX86 & " " & quoted form of userX86 & " >> " & quoted form of logPath & " 2>&1;
else
  echo \"x86 dir exists, not seeding\" >> " & quoted form of logPath & ";
fi;

if [ ! -d " & quoted form of userX64 & " ]; then
  echo \"Seeding x64 dir\" >> " & quoted form of logPath & ";
  /bin/cp -R " & quoted form of bundleX64 & " " & quoted form of userX64 & " >> " & quoted form of logPath & " 2>&1;
else
  echo \"x64 dir exists, not seeding\" >> " & quoted form of logPath & ";
fi;

if [ ! -f " & quoted form of userDb & " ]; then
  echo \"Seeding modder.db\" >> " & quoted form of logPath & ";
